\tzpentry{ID4055}{Around TZP Trawinistic Winding Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4055 introduces Around TZP Trawinistic Winding Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$ around the TZP, the Trawinistic winding number www is defined as w=12$
\]
